# Pranav Dhiran

> AI Engineer & Researcher. I build systems that train, fine-tune, and deploy language models ??? from weights to production.

## About
- ECE undergraduate, self-taught AI/ML
- Two-time Smart India Hackathon National Finalist
- Focus: LLM engineering, agentic systems, MCP server engineering, RF+AI

## Projects
- Medaura: Multi-agent pharmacy system ??? https://aipharmacyproject-blond.vercel.app
- SLM from Scratch: GPT-style transformer trained on TinyStories ??? https://github.com/Pranav-d33/small_language_model_from_scratch-TinyStories-
- GNU Radio MCP Server: LLM-to-SDR bridge ??? https://github.com/Pranav-d33/gnuradio-mcp-server
